offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes missed discounts and supplier penalties. We automate compliance reporting instead of manual tracking and reporting using spreadsheets.
problem: Difficulty in generating accurate monthly spend compliance reports from raw procurement data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about workflows
DM 20-50 Amazon sellers with a demo video
Join community forums for Amazon seller tools
try_it: Let users try Data import from CSV files and report generation
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video of the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
